features.name: integer inout port
features.description: Code should include an integer-typed port declared as inout, which creates a 32-bit bidirectional signal that can interact with both continuous assignments and procedural blocks

features.name: bitwise AND with constant zero on wide signal
features.description: Code should include a bitwise AND operation between an undeclared/wide signal and the constant zero, which produces a cell that the optimizer may try to reduce to a single bit

features.name: assignment to constant bit selection
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment targeting a constant or bit-select of zero, where the LHS is a constant expression that should normally be invalid

features.name: always block with conditional on constant and implicit declarations
features.description: Code should include an always block with an if-statement whose condition is a non-zero constant, assigning to an implicitly declared identifier, triggering creation of wires with no drivers
